creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #3)

As per § 6.31 Porter's Handbook:

> When available, completion files should always be installed.
> It is not necessary to make an option for it. If an option
> is used, though, always enable it in OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

If an option is used, the default needs to be "install shell completion files."
